staging_write_attempt.short_doc: Shadow alias for the start of a staging-write operation. Paired with `staging_write_result`.

staging_write_result.short_doc: Shadow alias for the outcome of a staging-write operation. Paired with `staging_write_attempt`.

task_validation_attempt.short_doc: Shadow alias for the start of a task-validation operation. Paired with `task_validation_result`.

task_validation_result.short_doc: Shadow alias for the outcome of a task-validation operation. Paired with `task_validation_attempt`.

orchestration_start.short_doc: Appended at orchestration init by `bin/ox.js` when the PM runs `ox state start`.

orchestration_complete.short_doc: Appended at orchestration close by `bin/ox.js` when the PM runs `ox state complete`.

orchestration_roi.short_doc: Appended by the PM at orchestration close per `agents/pm-reference/phase-close.md:250`.

archive_must_copy_validation.short_doc: Emitted by `bin/validate-archive.js` at orchestration close to record the outcome

deprecated_kill_switch_detected.short_doc: **DORMANT v2.2.14 — declared but no current emitters.** v2.2.14 G-04 fully retired

teammate_idle.short_doc: Emitted by `bin/reassign-idle-teammate.js` (TeammateIdle hook, Agent Teams mode)

replan.short_doc: Emitted by the PM (Section "Replan Event") whenever the PM rebuilds the task

fields_projected.short_doc: Emitted by `bin/record-mcp-checkpoint.js` (PostToolUse hook) when an MCP

output_shape_observed.short_doc: Emitted alongside `output_shape_applied` to record that an MCP tool's response

output_shape_observed_pair_missing.short_doc: Emitted when an `output_shape_observed` row is recorded but its sibling

mcp_checkpoint_missing.short_doc: Emitted by `bin/gate-agent-spawn.js` immediately before `exit(2)` whenever the

calibrate_skipped_fresh_cache.short_doc: > Coordinated declare with W8b FN-27. The emitter lives in

install_stale_hook_pruned.short_doc: > Coordinated declare with W8b FN-16. The emitter lives in `bin/install.js`

install_hook_args_updated.short_doc: > Coordinated declare with W8b FN-14. The emitter lives in `bin/install.js`

context_size_hint_gate_warn.short_doc: Emitted by `bin/validate-context-size-hint.js` (FN-44, v2.2.15) for the first

worktree_auto_commit_emitted.short_doc: Emitted when SubagentStop hook successfully auto-commits a dirty linked worktree. Closes the four-time-recurring data-loss bug where uncommitted agent edits were silently discarded by worktree cleanup

worktree_auto_commit_failed.short_doc: Emitted when the W1 auto-commit attempt fails (git commit exited non-zero). `stderr_excerpt` is truncated to first 200 chars.

tombstone_until_probe_passed.short_doc: Emitted when `npm run test:tombstone-probe` exits 0 — all 4 invariants pass. `invariants_checked` always equals 4 (value_is_string, value_is_iso, value_is_future, value_within_ttl).

tombstone_until_probe_failed.short_doc: Emitted when the AC-11 probe fails an invariant. `failed_assertion` enum: `value_is_string` | `value_is_iso` | `value_is_future` | `value_within_ttl`.

schema_cache_invalidated.short_doc: Emitted by the schema-shadow validator when its cached parse is invalidated by an mtime change to `event-schemas.md`. `cause` enum: `mtime_changed` | `stat_failed` | `manual`. `new_mtime` is null when

dual_install_autoheal.short_doc: Emitted when the dual-install parity check successfully overwrites a stale global-install file with local-install bytes. `from_install` is always `local`, `to_install` always `global`.

dual_install_autoheal_skipped.short_doc: Emitted when auto-heal would have run but a precondition failed. `reason` enum: `reverse_direction_global_newer` | `local_missing` | `global_missing` | `sha_mismatch_post_write` | `permission_denied`

tokenwright_bootstrap_applied.short_doc: Emitted when the W8 rolling-median bootstrapper computes a per-agent estimate from at least 3 historical `tokenwright_realized_savings.actual_input_tokens` samples. `pre_estimate` is the static fallba

tokenwright_bootstrap_skipped.short_doc: Emitted when bootstrap was attempted but skipped. `reason` enum: `metrics_file_missing` | `parse_error` | `insufficient_samples`. Note: `kill_switch` is intentionally NOT a reason — kill switches are

master_auto_commit_emitted.short_doc: Emitted when the W3 PM Stop hook successfully auto-commits a dirty master tree

master_auto_commit_failed.short_doc: Emitted when the W3 master auto-commit attempt fails (git commit exited non-zero).

dossier_compensation_inject.short_doc: Emitted when the W6 SessionStart compensation logic re-injects an orphaned dossier

dossier_compensation_skipped.short_doc: Emitted when compensation was attempted but skipped. Unlike W8's silent kill-switch
